docs.text: A continuación se detalla la documentación generada automáticamente desde los docstrings:

docs.title: mi_script
docs.text:
Example module for MkDocs API reference.

This module contains sample functions documented with docstrings so that mkdocstrings can render them on the site.

docs.title: function_name(arg1, arg2)
docs.text:
One-line summary of what the function does.

Longer description if needed. Mention assumptions, units, or edge cases here.

Parameters:

Name Type Description Default arg1 int

What arg1 represents.

required arg2 str

What arg2 represents.

required

Returns:

Type Description bool

What the function returns.

Raises:

Type Description ValueError

When invalid input is provided.

Source code in src\mi_script.py 
def function_name(arg1: int, arg2: str) -> bool:
    """One-line summary of what the function does.

    Longer description if needed. Mention assumptions, units,
    or edge cases here.

    Args:
        arg1: What arg1 represents.
        arg2: What arg2 represents.

    Returns:
        What the function returns.

    Raises:
        ValueError: When invalid input is provided.
    """
    print("hola")
    return True
